title: Built-up area will expand by more than 50 percent over the next 25 years
source: Pesaresi et al. 2024. "Advances on the Global Human Settlement Layer by Joint Assessment of Earth Observation and Population Survey Data." , International Journal of Digital Earth 17(1).
visdescription: This is a stacked area chart showing total built-up area over time - from 2000 to 2025 (actual) and from 2025 to 2050 (estimated). Each stack represents an income group.
keyFactLabel: increase in urban built-up area is expected in the next 25 years.
